response.justification: Strong senior-level fullstack engineer with 15+ years across the stack and current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, which directly matches the role's AI agent requirement. Deep testing/TDD background, founder-level ownership on GISCollective, and solid coverage of databases, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS. Gaps around explicit Nest.js and Vitest are notable but easily bridgeable given the breadth of frameworks already used.
strengths: Current role already involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching a key requirement
15+ years fullstack across TypeScript/Node.js/React with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes
Strong testing/TDD culture: built D test runner and assertion library, ran TDD/Selenium courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
No explicit Vitest experience (testing background is broader but framework-specific exposure unclear)
Significant career investment in DLang may indicate preference for non-primary-stack work

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role
Missing explicit Nest.js and Vitest exposure
